thornwood_awakening.name: The Thornwood Awakening
thornwood_awakening.description: You awaken in the Deep Thornwood with no memory of how you arrived. The cursed forest tests all who enter — survive its guardian, defeat its predators, and reach the safety of Briarhollow Hamlet. Only then does your true journey begin.
objectives: Survive the encounter with Bramble
Defeat the Thornwood Wolf
Escape the Deep Thornwood
Reach Briarhollow Hamlet

thornwood_investigation.name: The Spreading Blight
thornwood_investigation.description: Marta has noticed the thorns are growing faster — reaching the hamlet walls. Something in the Deep Thornwood is accelerating the curse. Investigate and find the source.
objectives: Speak to Marta about the spreading thorns
Enter the Deep Thornwood
Find evidence of the curse's source
Report back to Marta

troll_riddle.name: The Bridge Keeper's Bargain
troll_riddle.description: Grimjaw the troll demands a toll to cross his bridge — but not in gold. He wants something far more interesting: the answer to his riddle. Fail, and you're dinner.
objectives: Approach the Troll Bridge
Listen to Grimjaw's riddle
Answer correctly (or find another way across)

witch_bargain.name: The Thornweaver's Price
witch_bargain.description: The Thornweaver knows how to break the curse, but her help requires a task: retrieve a silver chalice from the Ruined Chapel. Simple enough — except the chapel's guardian may not agree.
objectives: Find the Thornweaver in her hollow
Learn what she needs
Retrieve the Silver Chalice from the Ruined Chapel
Return the chalice to the Thornweaver

lost_knight.name: The Knight's Vigil
lost_knight.description: Sir Aldric has patrolled the castle approach for years, unable to enter or leave. He believes a blessing from Father Moss could break his binding. But the path between them is through the Deep Thornwood.
objectives: Speak with Sir Aldric
Travel to the Ruined Chapel
Convince Father Moss to create a blessing
Bring the blessing to Sir Aldric

break_the_curse.name: The Briar Crown
break_the_curse.description: The ultimate quest: confront the Briar King and end the curse that devours the Thornwood. But killing the king may not be the answer — he was a victim too. The choice will define the world's fate.
objectives: Gather allies and knowledge about the curse
Find a way past Bramble in the Deep Thornwood
Reach the Briarthrone
Confront the Briar King
Choose: destroy the crown, free the king, or claim the power

wanderers_trial.name: The Wanderer's Trial
wanderers_trial.description: Before the Thornwood accepts you, it tests you. A voice from the standing stones challenges you to prove your worth — fight a shadow, solve a riddle, and make an offering. Only then may you walk the cursed paths freely.
objectives: Visit the Whispering Stones and hear the challenge
Defeat the Shadow Wisp in combat
Answer Echo's riddle
Leave an offering at the stone shrine

pips_heist.name: Pip's Impossible Heist
pips_heist.description: Pip has spotted something priceless at the Goblin Market — a music box that plays a song only the dead can hear. But Nixie won't sell it for gold. Pip needs a partner for a daring swap: distract Nixie while Pip makes the switch.
objectives: Meet Pip behind the tavern in Briarhollow
Travel to the Goblin Market together
Distract Nixie Quickfingers (persuasion or performance)
Signal Pip when the moment is right
Escape the market before Nixie notices

fathers_garden.name: The Priest's Last Garden
fathers_garden.description: Father Moss tends a garden in the ruined chapel where flowers grow that shouldn't exist — blooms that cure the thorn-sickness. But the seeds are dying. He needs someone to find the Mother Root deep in the Thornwood before the last flower wilts.
objectives: Speak with Father Moss about the dying garden
Enter the Deep Thornwood and search for the Mother Root
Negotiate with or fight past Bramble who guards it
Return the Mother Root to Father Moss
